summary: Comprehensive testing of Wallet, Payment, and Settings features for Trend Syria e-commerce platform. All 24 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI testing completed successfully for Wallet page, Admin Withdrawals tab, and Admin Settings tab.
passed_tests: ✅ Wallet: GET /api/wallet/balance - Returns wallet balance for seller
✅ Wallet: GET /api/wallet/balance - Returns 403 for customer (correctly restricted)
✅ Withdrawal: POST /api/wallet/withdraw - Correctly rejects insufficient balance
✅ Withdrawal: POST /api/wallet/withdraw - Correctly rejects below minimum (50,000 ل.س)
✅ Delivery Fee: GET /api/payment/delivery-fee - Same city returns 3000 ل.س
✅ Delivery Fee: GET /api/payment/delivery-fee - Nearby city returns 5000 ل.س
✅ Delivery Fee: GET /api/payment/delivery-fee - Medium distance returns 8000 ل.س
✅ Delivery Fee: GET /api/payment/delivery-fee - Far city returns 12000 ل.س
✅ Settings: GET /api/settings - Returns full settings for admin
✅ Settings: PUT /api/settings/delivery-fees - Admin can update delivery fees
✅ Admin Withdrawals: GET /api/payment/admin/withdrawals - Admin can see all withdrawals
✅ Frontend: Wallet page (/wallet) loads with balance card, withdraw button, tabs
✅ Frontend: Admin Withdrawals tab shows stats and filter buttons
✅ Frontend: Admin Settings tab shows delivery fees, withdrawal limits, free shipping threshold
critical_code_review_comments: Wallet, Payment, and Settings APIs are well-structured and follow REST patterns
Proper role-based access control implemented (seller/delivery for wallet, admin for settings)
Delivery fee calculation correctly handles 4 distance types: same_city, nearby, medium, far
Frontend components use data-testid attributes for reliable testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: New payment system tested: Wallet APIs (/api/wallet/*), Payment APIs (/api/payment/*), Settings APIs (/api/settings/*). All features working. Key delivery fees: same_city=3000, nearby=5000, medium=8000, far=12000 ل.س. Min withdrawal: seller=50000, delivery=25000 ل.س. ShamCash payment is MOCKED - accepts any 6-digit OTP.

list: /api/payment/verify-otp - ShamCash payment verification accepts any 6-digit OTP for testing

wallet.balance_api: Working - returns wallet balance with available, pending, total earned
wallet.withdraw_api: Working - validates minimum amount and available balance

payment.delivery_fee_api: Working - calculates fee based on city distance
payment.admin_withdrawals_api: Working - admin can view and filter withdrawals

frontend.wallet_page: Working - shows balance, tabs, withdraw button
frontend.admin_withdrawals_tab: Working - shows stats, filters, empty state
frontend.admin_settings_tab: Working - shows all settings with save buttons
